rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Source domain article (Tuareg caravan); not an LLM training method. Below all thresholds.
Long-horizon LLM training curricula — conceptually related to multi-stop traversal but lacks K-domain sequential FT + per-layer forget-rate + alternating regularization oases. Below 0.70 threshold.
CLoRA: controlled LoRA with subspace regularization for sequential tasks — directly overlaps with LoRA + regularization for sequential multi-task FT, the core mechanism of AZALAI-CURRICULUM.
Dynamic curriculum LoRA experts for continual MM IT — curriculum + LoRA + continual multi-domain = near-direct functional match to K-oasis sequential FT curriculum with LoRA portfolio.
Multi-LoRA continual instruction tuning framework — portfolio of LoRA modules across continual domains matches portfolio-tracking multi-domain FT.
ProgLoRA static+dynamic for continual IT — progressive sequential LoRA fine-tuning overlaps with K-oasis sequential FT curriculum.
LoRA Learns Less Forgets Less — directly addresses LoRA + per-layer forgetting trade-off, the core 'explicit forget-rate per layer' partial-overwrite LoRA mechanism.
Learn More Bother Less PE continual learning — explicit trade-off (acquire new vs preserve foundation) maps to the salt-for-X trade specialization with regularization-oasis refresh.

fail_reason: Six results meet sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7 thresholds (ranks 3,4,5,6,7,8). The candidate AZALAI-CURRICULUM substantially overlaps with established 2024-2025 work on (a) LoRA + regularization for sequential continual FT (CLoRA), (b) curriculum LoRA experts for continual multi-domain IT (Tsinghua Dynamic Curriculum LoRA, ProgLoRA, Multi-LoRA continual), (c) explicit LoRA forgetting trade-off (LoRA Learns Less Forgets Less), and (d) parameter-efficient continual learning trade-off (Learn More Bother Less). The 'K-oasis curriculum + alternating regularization + per-layer forget-rate + portfolio of LoRA experts' composition reduces to known continual-LoRA curriculum frameworks; the caravan/oasis dressing does not add a novel computational mechanism. Rule 'total_hits>=1 -> FAIL' triggered with 6 hits.
